job.title: SAP FICO Consultant
job.published: Published on 11 June 2026 · Position available immediately
job.desc.1: As an SAP FICO Consultant in Avignon, you support our clients in implementing and optimising their SAP Finance (FI) and Controlling (CO) modules.
mission.1: Analyse functional requirements for Finance / Management Control
mission.2: Customise and configure SAP FI/CO modules
profile.1: Bachelor's to Master's degree in computer science, finance, or management
profile.2: 3 to 7 years of experience SAP FI/CO
profile.3: Proficiency in accounting and controlling processes
profile.4: Certification SAP FI ou CO is a plus
profile.5: Rigour, client focus, and ability to work as part of a team
